phase: $0 organic compound · CelesteOS page sole asset · 15 carousels across 6 weeks · success = follower-base growth + sustained CTR, NOT per-post reach · 2026-05-28: slate narrowed to handover-class + repeat-fault-class only (post-5/6/7/8/9/11/12/14/16/17 killed; post-15 demoted pending-post-18-reach; post-18 chase-the-predecessor added Fri 2026-06-05)
cadence_rule: 3 carousels/week (Mon · Wed · Fri) · consistency compounds the follower base · no paid amplification (CEO directive 2026-05-18: ad spend buys reach not conversion)
primary_account: CelesteOS company page (sole asset · zero personal involvement)
company_page_role: primary · originates ALL content · personal profile never posts, reshares, or comments (CEO directive 2026-05-18 · overrides skill §16/§17.3-step-4 personal-originates canon for this account)

calendar.hook: Ask not what features it has.

calendar.rationale: Same pain class as P-001 (knowledge walks off the boat), different facet — post-handover chase. First post under 2026-05-28 pivot framework.
Time-as-artifact · re-frame of 32-imp throttled handover-hour post.
€1,900/recurrence × 3 cost-bomb · cross-rotation memory = the canonical CelesteOS promise.

checkpoints.label: Day 7 company-page baseline check
checkpoints.action: Capture EQS + impressions of posts 2 + 3 against CelesteOS PAGE follower count (fill live count from tools/linkedin_impression_capture.py — do not assume). Company-page healthy benchmark: ≥0.5% of followers at 60 min, 1-3% at 24 h. This is a STRUCTURAL ceiling, not a throttle — small absolute numbers are expected and are NOT content failure. Continue regardless; this checkpoint establishes the compound baseline.

checkpoints.label: Day 14 compound-health gate · two decoupled signals
checkpoints.action: No personal/throttle benchmark applies — company page has a structural 1-3% organic ceiling by design. Two independent reads against the CelesteOS PAGE: (a) FOLLOWER GROWTH — net new page followers trending up across the 14 days (the only metric that compounds; org reach scales with the base, not the post); (b) CTR QUALITY — click-through + saves-weighted EQS holding or rising across posts 2-5, independent of absolute reach. Hold cadence at 3/week regardless; advance nothing on reach. $0 organic compound is a months-long curve — judge the trendline, never a single post's impressions.

checkpoints.label: Day 28 mid-compound review
checkpoints.action: Top/bottom 3 EQS across all published carousels. Outliers feed back as derivative carousels (NOT cross-posted to other accounts — zero personal/owned-account involvement). Page-follower delta vs. Day 14 = the headline metric. Anti-pattern check: no repeated USPs in consecutive weeks; off-platform follow funnel (site / verifier / email) is the only follower-acquisition lever and must be live.

checkpoints.label: Day 42 wave-2 close-out
checkpoints.action: Full slate retrospective on the CelesteOS page only. Headline question: is the follower base compounding (Day 42 vs Day 0 net followers + CTR trend)? Decide wave 3 format mix (carousel-exclusive vs. add text+image / website-link). $0 organic remains the model unless CEO revisits — paid was rejected 2026-05-18 (reach ≠ conversion).

next_brief_due: 2026-06-30 (Tuesday) — wave-3 brief generation begins from bank, excluding the 15 IDs in this calendar
